items.md: # Professional Summary
items.value: Professional Summary

items.md: Accomplished Security Systems Design & Operations Manager with over 14+ years of experience leading end-to-end security infrastructure for iconic projects such as EXPO 2020, Red Sea Global ultra-luxury developments, and major financial institutions. Demonstrated expertise in both the design and operational management of complex systems, including VMS, ACS, and PSIM platforms, within high-risk, mission-critical environments. Skilled in bridging design intent with operational efficiency, ensuring reliable, scalable, and compliant security solutions. Adept at managing cross-functional teams, coordinating with consultants, operators, and contractors, and driving value through risk mitigation, vendor oversight, and lifecycle maintenance strategies. Proven success in delivering integrated security systems across the hospitality, government, and critical infrastructure sectors.
items.value: Accomplished Security Systems Design & Operations Manager with over 14+ years of experience leading end-to-end security infrastructure for iconic projects such as EXPO 2020, Red Sea Global ultra-luxury developments, and major financial institutions. Demonstrated expertise in both the design and operational management of complex systems, including VMS, ACS, and PSIM platforms, within high-risk, mission-critical environments. Skilled in bridging design intent with operational efficiency, ensuring reliable, scalable, and compliant security solutions. Adept at managing cross-functional teams, coordinating with consultants, operators, and contractors, and driving value through risk mitigation, vendor oversight, and lifecycle maintenance strategies. Proven success in delivering integrated security systems across the hospitality, government, and critical infrastructure sectors.

markdown_full:
# SHEMEER BADARUDEEN

## Security Design & Operations, PMP|PSP|CPP

**Address**: Al Mamzar, Street 15C, Dubai.
**Phone**: UAE: +971 52 12 666 56, India: +91 9656360596 - **Email**: shemeerbadar12@gmail.com
**Date of Birth**: 12 Dec 1988 **Driving License**: United Arab Emirates, Qatar, KSA, India | UAE Golden Visa

# Professional Summary

Accomplished Security Systems Design & Operations Manager with over 14+ years of experience leading end-to-end security infrastructure for iconic projects such as EXPO 2020, Red Sea Global ultra-luxury developments, and major financial institutions. Demonstrated expertise in both the design and operational management of complex systems, including VMS, ACS, and PSIM platforms, within high-risk, mission-critical environments. Skilled in bridging design intent with operational efficiency, ensuring reliable, scalable, and compliant security solutions. Adept at managing cross-functional teams, coordinating with consultants, operators, and contractors, and driving value through risk mitigation, vendor oversight, and lifecycle maintenance strategies. Proven success in delivering integrated security systems across the hospitality, government, and critical infrastructure sectors.

# Skills

* Operations Management
* Security Projects & Implementation
* Security Policies & Procedures
* Security Compliance & Governance
* Crisis and Disaster Management
* Network
* Threat & Risk Assessment
* Command Control Center
* Budget oversight
* Audit coordination
* Operational risk management
* Asset Protection

# Certifications

* Project Management & Planning, **PMP**, PMI
* Physical Security Professional, **PSP**, ASIS.
* Certified Protection Professional, **CPP**, ASIS
* Cisco Certified Network Administration, **CCNA**, Cisco.
* Physical Security Information Management System, **PSIM**, CNL/Vid-sys/Control Pro/Prism.
* Milestone Technical Configuration, Milestone.
* SIRA Certified Engineer.
* Control Pro, Siemens.
* Security Screening System – Nuctech.
* Explosive Trace Detector, Siemens.
* Lenel/Hirsch/Honeywell/Salto/RBH/Si-Pass/Bosh - Access Control Trainings.
* Dell/Resilient/HP/Pelco/Genetec/Milestone.
* Bosch/Genetec/Milestone/Control Pro/Cloud IVS, SMS Solutions.
* Seagate/Veracity/Promise, Storage Solutions.

# Experience

**Senior Manager - Security Design & Operations**

October 2023 to Present

**RED SEA GLOBAL - Riyadh**

* Successfully led and developed a high-performing team of professionals at Amaala, fostering a culture of excellence and accountability.
* Visionary Senior Manager at Red Sea Global, driving ICT and Security innovations in ultra-luxury developments.
* Established clear performance metrics and KPIs to drive team productivity and align with organizational goals.
* Proven ability to lead complex, multi-stakeholder projects from concept through to operational readiness.
* Expert in Smart City technologies, integrated security, and ICT systems tailored for high-end hospitality and wellness environments.

---

* Delivered future-ready, sustainable ICT infrastructure for elite assets such as Rosewood, Four Seasons, Marina and Six Senses
* Effectively engaged with key stakeholders including operators, consultants, and contractors across all project phases.
* Built and nurtured strategic partnerships with vendors and suppliers, securing favorable terms and ensuring seamless project delivery.
* Developed and managed budgets, ensuring financial control and timely delivery of initiatives.
* Spearheaded the strategic direction and oversight of the security delivery team, ensuring alignment with Red Sea Global overarching security objectives.
* Championed compliance with internal security policies, procedures, and industry regulations, ensuring rigorous implementation of security controls.
* Partnered with internal incident response teams and external stakeholders to identify, anticipate, and mitigate emerging threats proactively.
* Designed and executed comprehensive security delivery plans, managing project timelines, resource allocation, and risk mitigation strategies.
* Managed security budgets, ensuring cost-effective deployment of solutions without compromising quality or effectiveness.
* Conducted detailed security audits and risk assessments; identified critical gaps and implemented corrective actions to strengthen the security posture.

**Design & Operations Manager - Security**
April 2022 to October 2023
**Museum of the Future - Dubai**

* Manage and oversee new projects, installation, maintenance, and upgrade of security systems, such as Access control, CCTV, and alarm systems.
* Ensure that security policies and procedures are followed and adhered to by all staff and visitors.
* Ensure that security systems are functioning properly and that any issues are resolved in a timely manner.
* Conduct regular risk assessments of the museum's premises and identify potential security threats.
* Conduct trainings for strategic steering committee for promoting risk culture within the organization internally and site wide.
* Develop and implement security measures to mitigate identified risks.
* Hire, train, and supervise security staff, including security guards and technicians.
* Develop and implement staff schedules to ensure that all areas of the museum are properly staffed.
* Collaborate with other museum departments, such as operations, facilities, and IT, to ensure that security systems and procedures are integrated and aligned with the museum's overall objectives.
* Developed departmental objectives, budgets, policies, procedures, and strategies.

**Manager Security Systems**
June 2019 to April 2022
**Expo 2020 - Expo city, UAE**

* To build and deliver security systems projects in Expo 2020, Including CCTV, ACS, ANPR, UVSS, ESTS, Command and control, video Analytics, RSA, VSA, IACS, Accreditation etc.
* Manage and oversee the security design and integrations with different stakeholders, international participates for Expo2020.
* Verify integrations of several systems and sub systems to Expo Command Center for incident response and efficient operation.
* Coordination with government entities such as SIRA, Dubai Police, State Security for security design approvals.
* Select, implement, and manage security countermeasures to reduce the risk of loss of information and data.

* Executed project schedule and milestones within the allocated budget and specified timeline.

**Abu Dhabi Islamic Bank - UAE**

infrastructure for iconic projects such as EXPO 2020, Red Sea Global ultra-luxury developments, and major financial institutions.
Demonstrated expertise in both the design and operational management of complex systems, including VMS, ACS, and PSIM
platforms, within high-risk, mission-critical environments. Skilled in bridging design intent with operational efficiency, ensuring
reliable, scalable, and compliant security solutions. Adept at managing cross-functional teams, coordinating with consultants,
operators, and contractors, and driving value through risk mitigation, vendor oversight, and lifecycle maintenance strategies. Proven
success in delivering integrated security systems across the hospitality, government, and critical infrastructure sectors.
